error_signature: Invalid Record Length: columns length is 54, got 56 on line 2
title: CSV extraction fails due to mismatched column count
symptom: The Extract from File node throws an error indicating a mismatch between the number of header columns and data columns in the CSV file.
applies_when: CSV file has mismatched header and data columns
not_this_if: CSV file has matching header and data columns
Using a different file format like XLS or XLSX
root_cause: The Extract from File node expects the number of data columns to match the number of header columns. When the CSV file has more data columns than headers, it results in an invalid record length error.
fix_steps: Download the CSV file and open it in a spreadsheet application.
Remove the extra columns that do not have headers.
Re-upload the corrected CSV file to n8n.
agent_instruction: Modify the CSV file to ensure the number of data columns matches the header columns before extraction.
